<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band11_chunk008.pdf#page=6 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band11 p360 -->

LANDKREIS EBERSBERG · GRAFING

<!-- header: LANDKREIS EBERSBERG · GRAFIN -->


[[File:Band11_chunk008_p006_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band11_chunk008_p006_img002.jpg|thumb|Der Apostel Johannes am Grab Mariens, Ausschnitt aus Fresko A]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band11 p361 -->
